channel.title: GitHub Typst Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Typst in GitHub

item.title: DeveloperPaul123/modern-cv
item.description: A modern resume template written in Typst, inspired by Awesome-CV

item.title: Jollywatt/typst-fletcher
item.description: Typst package for drawing diagrams with arrows, built on top of CeTZ.
